title: orthosiphon tomentosus var. viscosus
intro: Orthosiphon tomentosus var. viscosus, also known as Uva Ursi or Bear's Grape, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include astringent, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Orthosiphon tomentosus var. viscosus include its ability to help with urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
